data.name: Hentai Age Hospital
data.detailed_description:
Embark on a soothing and enchanting puzzle experience where every completed stage reveals stunning, alluring images of beautiful girls. Relaxing background melodies set a peaceful mood as you slide and arrange tiles to form the final picture. With each level becoming a bit more challenging, your focus and problem-solving skills will be put to the test.

Play at your own rhythm with zero time limits—no rush, no pressure. Whether you enjoy casual gameplay or love brain-teasing puzzles, this journey offers captivating visuals and long-lasting enjoyment.

Features:

Unlock charming and attractive girl artwork as you progress.

Immerse yourself in calming music that enhances the serene atmosphere.

View each completed image in full after finishing the puzzle.

Enjoy endless stages with smoothly increasing difficulty.

No timers—just pure, stress-free puzzle fun.

data.short_description: Enjoy a relaxing puzzle game where each completed level unveils stunning images of beautiful girls. No time limits—just calm music, soothing gameplay, and steadily increasing challenges.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 捷克文*, 荷蘭文*, 希臘文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 挪威文*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
